title: ANC - 9.-ANC is ON and its value is either Adaptive or Standard and the User doesn’t change value during a call when Transparency is OFF with the selected value Environment or Speech
scenario: ANC and Transparency controls should be disabled during an active call and restore to previous values after the call ends.
steps: Set ANC to Adaptive or Standard mode.
Set Transparency to OFF (Environment or Speech mode).
Attempt to change ANC values during the call.
Attempt to change Transparency values during the call.
Observe the Transparency toggle state and any popup.
Check ANC mode after the call ends.
Check Transparency mode after the call ends.
Verify that both ANC and Transparency are togglable again.
expected: During an active call, ANC and Transparency values cannot be changed. The Transparency toggle is greyed out and shows a popup that the option is unavailable. After the call ends, both ANC and Transparency modes return to their previously selected values and are togglable again.
